code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
let n = lines.len()

mut count = n
if n > 0
  match lines.get(n - 1)
  when Some(last)
    if last == ""
      count = n - 1
    end
  when None
    count = 0
  end
end

mut i = 0
while i < count
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    print("[#{i}] #{line}")
  when None
    print("")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
